title: Difference between Body & Soul | Bhagavad Gita Verses 13.32 - 13.35 | HG Amitasana Das | HKM Mumbai
speaker: HG Amitasana Dasa

segments.text: Okay, so we are covering verse number 32 to 35 today. It's from the 13th chapter and this
chapter has 35 verses and these four verses are essentially talking about the difference
between the body and the soul. How is the soul different from the body? Before we get
into the discussion, this body is made of 24 elements. Please raise hands and let's
start counting those 24 elements. Anyone would like to raise hands and suggest? We can go
